properties.description: Turns the Stellar Anchor on, when set to 1. Turns it off, when set to 0.
Returns whether the Stellar Anchor is flashing an error. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns the current amount of power needed for the Stellar Anchor.
(Assumption) Returns (-411792553) a unique type identifier for the Stellar Anchor.
Returns whether the Stellar Anchor is receiving power and is turned on. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
